name: regent_starter_plus_refine_bulwark_cosmic_cloak_glimmer_shortline
description: Shortline simulation fixture for Regent A10 starter deck plus RefineBlade, Bulwark, CosmicIndifference, CloakOfStars, and Glimmer.
assumptions: Starter deck uses the existing Regent A10 starter definition, including AscendersBane.
Chinese name mapping used: 铸造剑刃=RefineBlade, 铸墙=Bulwark, 宇宙冷漠=CosmicIndifference, 群星斗篷=CloakOfStars, 微光=Glimmer.
Seed was randomly generated for this scenario run; base and no_glimmer variants share the same seed for paired comparison.
CosmicIndifference should be handled by card-object move simulation: from Discard to top of Draw.
Block, Weak, and enemy pressure use the current static valuation policy; encounter HP loss is not modeled.
